scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/llm',{recursive:true}); require('fs').copyFileSync('src/llm/llm.yaml','dist/llm/llm.yaml');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/summary/template'; fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync(p+'/images',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/summary/template/sessionbridge-report.html', p+'/sessionbridge-report.html'); fs.copyFileSync('src/summary/template/myself-lately-report.html', p+'/myself-lately-report.html'); fs.copyFileSync('src/summary/template/styles.css', p+'/styles.css'); const imgs=fs.readdirSync('src/summary/template/images'); imgs.forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync('src/summary/template/images/'+f, p+'/images/'+f));" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/summary/prompts'; fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true}); const files=fs.readdirSync('src/summary/prompts').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.md')); files.forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync('src/summary/prompts/'+f, p+'/'+f));" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/guides'; fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/guides/user_guide.md', p+'/user_guide.md'); fs.copyFileSync('src/guides/admin_guide.md', p+'/admin_guide.md');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/engagement/checkin',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/engagement/checkin/checkin.yaml','dist/engagement/checkin/checkin.yaml');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/engagement/nudge',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/engagement/nudge/nudge.yaml','dist/engagement/nudge/nudge.yaml');"
